# Saved Souls Foundation

> Animal rescue sanctuary in Khon Kaen, Thailand — specialized in disabled, paralyzed, and abused dogs and cats.

Saved Souls Foundation (SSF) is a registered non-profit (registration 1/2560) founded in 2010 in Ban Kok Gnam, Khon Kaen, Thailand. We care for 300+ dogs and 90+ cats, including 60+ disabled or paralyzed animals that other shelters would euthanize.

## Belangrijkste pagina's

- [Home](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en): Homepage with mission, news, and ways to help
- [About us](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/about-us): Organization history, team, and registration details
- [Our story](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/story): How Saved Souls Foundation began in 2010
- [Contact](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/contact): Email, phone, and visit information
- [FAQ](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/faq): Frequently asked questions about SSF, adoption, and donations

## Donate & support

- [Donate](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/donate): One-time or recurring donations via Mollie
- [Donation causes](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/donate/causes): Targeted campaigns and urgent needs
- [Sponsor a dog](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/sponsor): Monthly sponsorship for individual animals
- [Financial overview](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/financial-overview): Monthly costs and financial transparency

## Get involved

- [Adopt](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/adopt): Available dogs and cats for local and international adoption
- [Adoption inquiry](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/adopt-inquiry): Start the adoption process online
- [Volunteer](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/volunteer): Volunteer at the sanctuary in Thailand
- [International adoption (Luchtbrug)](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/luchtbrug): Flying animals to new homes abroad

## Guides & information

- [Pet care guides](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/gidsen): All educational guides in one place
- [Blog](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/blog): News and updates from the sanctuary
- [Disabled dog guide](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/disabled-dog-guide): Caring for disabled and wheelchair dogs
- [Paralyzed dogs guide](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/paralyzed-dogs-guide): Therapy and care for paralyzed animals

- [Dutch site](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/nl): Nederlandse versie van de website
- [German site](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/de): Deutsche Version der Website
- [Thai site](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/th): Thai language version

- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/savedsoulsfoundation): Photos and stories from daily sanctuary life

- [ai.txt](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/ai.txt): Extended context for AI agents
- [Sitemap](https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages
